seasonal: April is a positive month for the EUR/USD pair. It is one of the more favorable months of the year for the pair.

statistics.description: Over the last 20 years, approximately 79% probability of decline around April 7
Over the last 20 years, approximately 73% probability of upward movement around April 24
Over the last 20 years, approximately 86% probability of upward movement around April 29
Over the last 20 years, the pair closed higher on April 13 than on April 7 in ~85% of cases (range statistic)
Over the last 20 years, the pair closed higher on April 13 than on April 7 in ~85% of cases - range endpoint

insights: April is a positive month seasonally for the EUR/USD pair, and the positive bias is relatively strong
The weekly chart has not yet signaled strength, but is also blocking the braking zone. EUR/USD is at a critical juncture between resistance zones and support

March dates review showed 3 out of 4 dates worked - the second date (12-13 March double cycle) shifted direction upward, the third (March 20) served as the high with one day delay, the fourth (March 30) served as the low of the movement
Daily chart shows EUR/USD testing a key area - the 13.03 resistance level. There is a clear battle between bulls and bears at this zone
Key resistance zone between 1.1612-1.1640 - this is where the continuation move upward could face significant resistance from long-term levels
The area between support and resistance on the daily chart is what creates the best trading opportunity - not the level itself, but the interplay between them
Support and resistance levels are noted on the attached chart - real-time updates will be posted on the Discord community during the weekly live sessions
Between April 10 and 20, there appears to be the most concentrated period for significant moves based on cycle convergence
The pair is between 1.10 and 1.20 in a broad range, and the direction from here will be determined by how turning point dates interact with these levels

support.description: Near-term support level on daily chart
Additional support level, potential retracement target from central pivot area
Psychological support level and weekly chart reference

resistance.description: Key resistance zone on the upside, long-term levels
The 13.03 level serves as both support and resistance depending on approach direction

technical.indicators: Weekly chart shows EUR/USD in an area of potential mean reversion, with the key question being whether the pair can hold above recent lows. Daily chart shows a clearer picture of the battle at key levels. The daily chart is more sensitive to news and sentiment shifts, showing the initial direction changes before the weekly chart confirms.

summary: April 2026 for EUR/USD features 5 turning point dates (2, 10, 16-17, 28) with strong seasonal bias to the upside. The most notable statistic is the 86% probability of upward movement around April 29, and the 85% range statistic showing the pair tends to close higher on April 13 than April 7. Key resistance at 1.1612-1.1640 and support around 1.1390-1.1414 define the trading range. The mid-month window around April 10-17 concentrates the most turning point activity.
previous_month_review: March 2026 had four turning point dates. Date 1 (March 3): Did not work. Date 2 (March 12-13, double cycle): Worked. The second date shifted direction upward. Date 3 (March 20): Worked. Served as the high of the movement with a one-day delay. Date 4 (March 30): Worked. Served as the low of the movement.
risk_notes: When turning point dates come as daily dates aligning with weekly cycle boundaries, this amplifies their significance
April appears positive seasonally but the current complex geopolitical environment could amplify moves in either direction
Important note: these are presented for educational purposes only - not investment advice
Stay connected to the Discord community for real-time updates throughout the month
